update_record_object_action.label: Object-specific action: update record
update_record_object_action.dataNotes: Action fields are direct fields on the target object. Relationship fields are supported in header_fields and record_fields, but not as update targets.

field_added_layout.label: Layout change: field added above the fold

create_record_object_action.label: Object-specific action: create related record
create_record_object_action.notes: Use same record shell and modal primitive. Different post-save visualization: related list count increments and new related card appears.

screen_flow_action.label: Button launches screen flow
screen_flow_action.notes: Use the same action button primitive, but modal/body is a flow screen sequence with Next/Finish states.

url_action.label: Button opens URL or external system
url_action.notes: Use same top-right button primitive, then render a browser/tab transition or integration visualization.
